text:
The sterile architecture of the first space holds a kind of calm and anticipation—its emptiness feels purposeful, like a canvas awaiting meaning. I sense both comfort and alienation here, a liminality between event and silence. 

Moving to the second image, I am energized by the intellectual stimulation and ambition of the R+D exhibit. Here, curiosity awakens as I am invited to reflect on humankind’s relationship with technology and progress. The vibrant display incites questions about innovation, coexistence, and the story of our evolving world. I feel engaged, curious, and ever so slightly overwhelmed by the complexity on display.
